rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Qbot Mounted Drive Script Executions

rules.rule_text:
title: Qbot Mounted Drive Script Executions
id: e69d709f-097f-4798-bf9a-aa600fc3249f
status: experimental
description: "Detects Windows Scripting Host processes (wscript.exe and cscript.exe)\
  \ that are \ninvoking the execution of common scripting formats that Red Canary\
  \ has observed \nbeing used by Qbot\u2014such as .js, .vbs, and .wsf\u2014that are\
  \ from a logical mounted \ndrive using the drive letters D: through Z: and that\
  \ have a child process. Part \nof the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/qbot/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.s0650
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.t1204
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \explorer.exe
    Image|endswith:
    - \cscript.exe
    - \wscript.exe
    CommandLine|re: '[d-z]:\.*[js|vbs|wsf]$'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
